svg.aria-label: A job goes from pending approval to pending, claimed, printing, and done. Printing can fail, jobs can be canceled, and finished jobs can be reprinted.

text.font-family: Excalifont, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif

svg.text: Any finished job can be reprinted.
